title: hibbertia muelleri
intro: Hibbertia muelleri, also known as Guinea flower, is a small, shrub-like plant native to Australia, characterized by its yellow or greenish-yellow flowers and lance-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hibbertia muelleri include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. Hibbertia muelleri is often prepared in herbal tea or tincture form, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
